name: Synthesize Topic
description: Generate or update a Zotero Synthesis Layer topic_synthesis artifact through MCP-backed library context.

prompts.common: Read assets/resolver.schema.json, then use Zotero MCP synthesis tools to inspect the library index, resolve the canonical resolver, and read paper artifacts. Generate a topic_synthesis result bundle for topicSeed={{ parameter.topicSeed }} with mode={{ parameter.mode }}. Write the synthesis Markdown to result/synthesis.md and return markdown_path, not the Markdown body, in the final JSON. Do not write Zotero items or canonical assets directly. Finish with exactly one JSON object matching the output schema.
